name: facebook-video-downloader
description: A powerful Facebook video downloader built with Tauri, Yew, and Tailwind CSS

scripts.build:frontend: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:css
scripts.build:wasm: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=8 cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --out-dir dist --target web --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/facebook_video_downloader_frontend.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:dev: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=8 cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --profile dev-fast && wasm-bindgen --out-dir dist --target web --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/dev-fast/facebook_video_downloader_frontend.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:fast: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=8 cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --profile dev-fast && wasm-bindgen --out-dir dist --target web --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/dev-fast/facebook_video_downloader_frontend.wasm
scripts.setup:manual: pnpm install && cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli && cargo install tauri-cli@^2.0

author: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
